reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

reviews.title: Way too small…
reviews.text: Way smaller than I had hoped for. Tiny toothbrushes the toothbrushes looks like they’ve been cut in half. That would have been fine but the toothbrush head is so tiny, I appreciate that these are compostable but I just feel like this could have been done better. The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! I won’t use the pills, I just bought these for the compostable toothbrushes, so I can’t really comment on those.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: Bitvae Smart S3 Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 180-Day Battery Life Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush with Pressure Sensor, Champagne Gold
features: 【Provides Diamond Cleaning】Bitvae Smart S3 Rechargeable sonic toothbrush features an industry-leading ultrasonic motor that generates 40,000RPM. 【Personalize Your Brushing】Here are 5 modes & 3 intensities on our sonic toothbrush (9 adjustable intensities on the app) for various gum care needs. This IPX7 waterproof toothbrush has a built-in 2mins timer that pulses every 30secs to remind you to switch to the next quadrant of the mouth.

【180-Day Battery Life】Bitvae S3 long-lasting battery toothbrush for adults features a 4-hour quick-charge battery that lasts up to 180 days, making it perfect for travel and far outperforming other toothbrushes on the market. Say goodbye to the bulky charging base with our USB Type-C cable.

【Pressure sensor protects teeth and gums】 Brushing too hard can damage tooth enamel, increase sensitivity and lead to gum recession. Our electronic toothbrush with pressure indicator will light up RED to remind you to reduce the pressure to protect your teeth and gums.

【"iSpruz" Smart Oral Care App】This Smart Bluetooth Toothbrush is paired with the app to track and store data on brushing time, coverage, uniformity and excess pressure. You can also change various settings through the app (such as brushing modes, intensities, and brushing time).

【Toothbrush Holder & Travel Case Included】The travel-friendly electric toothbrush includes a travel case that allows users to take the toothbrush anywhere. It also includes a toothbrush/phone holder that helps keep your toothbrush clean at all times. Great all round gift for yourself or your family.
【Package Includes】1 Bitvae S3 Toothbrush Handle, 4 Toothbrush Heads, 4 Toothbrush Covers, 1 Travel Case, 1 Toothbrush/Phone Holder, 1 USB Cable (Adaptor not Included), and 1 User Manual.
【1 Year Warranty】If you have any question, please contact bitvae fast and friendly customer service team, we will do our best to sovle any problem.

reviews.title: This toothbrush is amazing!
reviews.text: I was surprised by how well this smart electric toothbrush works. The toothbrush connected via Bluetooth to the iSpruz app without any problems. This is a great tool to improve your brushing skills! My teeth feel amazing after each brush. Great affordable toothbrush. Comes with a nice travel case.

reviews.title: Impressive amount of features and app allows customization and guidance for optimal brushing
reviews.text:
I got this to replace an old electric toothbrush, and I'm blown away at how technology has transformed tooth brushing! There are so many customizable features with this toothbrush, and the app will tell you if you're applying too much pressure, missing areas, or not spending enough time brushing.

Here are some of the pleasant surprises:

> Comes with a really nice travel case
> includes a special super soft brush head for gum massage
> The app is AMAZING. It's quick and easy to download and has lots of information and options to adjust the toothbrush operation
> Instruction pamphlet is well written and covers everything you need to know

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

reviews.title: Good value for the money, wish it pulsated a little stronger. Terrible app.
reviews.text: For the money this might be the best budget friendly electric toothbrush on Amazon in my opinion. Stay away from the app. It is terribly designed and doesn't consistently sync. The pulses are stronger than others in the same price class, but it isn't quite strong enough to give my mouth a feeling in deep cleaning.

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: I was interested to try these toothbrushes because I thought they might be good for camping, travel, etc. I have used a couple of them and I will definitely use the rest, but I probably won't purchase them in the future. The design seems a bit wasteful/odd, as the handle is quite thick and sturdy but rather short. It is hard for me to keep my grip as I brush because the handle is so short, and my hands are not even that big. I feel like I don't get as good of a cleaning/scrubbing because of the short handle. I think the manufacturer could make the handle a little less thick, but longer. I think it would be more effective if that were the case. Also, the taste is pretty bland and it doesn't leave a "fresh" taste (like a fresh minty taste) in my mouth. I know my teeth are probably clean, but it just doesn't feel or taste like I'm getting as good of a cleaning as I do with my regular-sized toothbrush and minty toothpaste. For a one or two day trip, they would be fine, but for anything longer, I'd want to bring a standard toothbrush.

reviews.title: Good for travel!
reviews.text: Good value for the price! Easy to travel and more sanitary than other travel brushes.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: These are convenient for travel.  Just pop them in my bag and I'm ready to go.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

title: Solodent Toothbrush Ultra Soft, Silver & Gold for Sensitive Teeth and Gums (Pack of 1) Colors May Vary
description: Enjoy the unprecedented, professional-like, cleaning experience of all-in-one Multi-Action Solodent SILVER SERIES Toothbrushes. Flossing Slim Ultra Soft Bristles gently clean hard to reach areas, between the teeth, under the gum line, and save tooth enamel from abrasion. They softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain. Extra Soft Bristles make this toothbrush perfect for those with gum recession, sensitive teeth, exposed roots, implants and braces. Silver infused embossed PBT bristles naturally fight and minimize bacterial growth on bristles and keep them clean between uses. Innovative Patented 3D Embossed PBT Bristles are designed to gently and effectively remove maximum plaque due to multitouch contacts to tooth surfaces. Actual Gold infused bristles. PBT (polybutylene terephthalate) bristles are more durable and less water-absorbent than traditional nylon bristles and outlast them by 50%. Beautiful patent pending diamond pattern design and ergonomic handle. Designed by a dentist. Made in South Korea.
features: Flossing Slim Ultra Soft Bristles gently clean hard to reach areas, between the teeth, under the gum line, and save tooth enamel from abrasion
Softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.
features: You will receive (1) Oral-B iO4 Electric Toothbrush, (1) Ultimate Clean Replacement Brush Head, and (1) Travel Case, and (1) charger
Clinically proven to remove 500% more plaque along the gumline vs. a regular manual toothbrush
4 Smart Modes for personalized brushing: Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive
Includes a 2 minute timer to ensure a complete clean
Pressure sensor indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure
Round head and gentle micro-vibrations
Oral-B: Trust the brush dentists use the most worldwide

reviews.title: Love buying quality in bulk!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are hard bristle though very sturdy! And such a deal for the price for the amount and quality of the item!! It is hard to separate the toothbrushes by hand, deft need scissors. But aside from that one minor drawback, they're perfect!

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

title: Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush With Supersoft Bristles, Pink/White
description: The Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush is unlike any other toothbrush on the market. With its innovative, patented tapering technique, the Perio Toothbrush features super slim polyester bristles that penetrate further between the teeth to remove plaque and debris. The Perio Toothbrush bristles are also ultra soft, reducing the likelihood of abrasion and recession while simultaneously allowing gentle gum stimulation. The polyester bristles of the Perio Toothbrush are less porous, creating a more hygienic brushing experience. The bristle also lasts approximately 50% longer than a standard nylon toothbrush. The Perio Toothbrush is great for all ages, including those undergoing orthodontic treatment, suffering from sensitivity or gum recession.
features: PME Edible Luster Spray 100ml. Use this Luster Spray on your Sugar Art projects!
PME Edible Luster Spray 100ml. Use this Luster Spray on your Sugar Art projects!
Create stunning luster effects with this easy to use luster spray color.
Contains alcohol. Made in Italy.
PME Quality Product!

reviews.title: Very soft, feels effective too
reviews.text: This is the softest toothbrush i have ever used.  I grew up believing that the harder the brush, the better for your teeth.  Now that i have almost no enamel left on my teeth i'm beginning to believe that softer might have been better all along.  These are super soft and almost fun to brush with.  I also bought the new Crest "chocolate" toothpaste!  If you're looking for a gentle and soft toothbrush, this is the one!

reviews.title: Excellent ultra soft  toothbrush
reviews.text: Dr Collins makes the best ultra soft toothbrush for excellent dental hygiene.... makes a big difference.... great purchase!!

reviews.title: Have used these for years and I really like them.
reviews.text: These perio toothbrushes are very comfortable and effective. I have used them for years. I like them better than the type brushes my dentist gives me with my 6 month cleaning visits.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Really like this toothbrush.

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is the best brush out there imo. First of all, this brush only comes in a compact size, which is the size most people should be using (versus full). Second, the bristles are very soft and gentle and are all the same length... there is no scratchy feel like with some other brushes that have various length bristles to reach further under the gumline. These bristles are very gentle on gums yet clean them well. The best thing is that the brush really cleans the teeth. In my experience this toothbrush cleans better that the oral b line, better than mentadent pro care, better than reach, and better than the butler gum summit which has similar tapered bristles. This is a very good toothbrush that gets the job done gently but very effectively.

High Quality & Effective Clean – MERUYOO toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonicare are made with end-rounded Dupont Nylon Bristles to ensure a thorough and effective clean. reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.

title: PerioSciences White Care Oral Care Kit - Toothpaste, Mouthwash, Gel
features: For your oral health -​​ PerioSciences Whitening Oral Care System is a three-product system for daily use by individuals who undergo peroxide-based professional whitening or strips. The product trio can make teeth even brighter, soothe soft tissue, and restore pH balance in the mouth.

Natural ingredients - This dental care kit is made using our signature antioxidants and botanicals such as Phloretin, perilla seed extract, and hesperetin. The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: This product works well. Although pricey, so worth it to save your teeth.

reviews.title: It is recommended by my dentist!
reviews.text: Use it daily and keeps my oral implants clean and healthy!

reviews.title: cleans my teeth well
reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

title: Etravel Travel Toothbrush Case And Cover - Luxury Toothbrush Holder, Portable Travel Organizer, Camping Supplies, Electric Toothbrush Case For Travel - 4 Colors [Navy]

【PERFECT GIFT】: Everybody loves to travel, nobody likes to pack, make their lives easier by gifting them the Etravel Luxury Toothbrush Case. Perfect for all ages and gender!

reviews.title: Difficult to open.
reviews.text: Just returned this item. Trying to open this container is almost impossible. To open one has to turn it and pull. When doing this it makes a terrible squeaking noise. I don't understand why so many people gave this a good review when it is so bad.

reviews.title: Easily fits our 2 Sonicare bases w/the brushes
reviews.text:
It also splits into 2 cups which is a nice feature, so we don't have to use the glasses in the hotel room as we don't know how clean those glasses are. It's a nice weight of plastic, and the blue color is rich looking.

The price is a bit on the higher side, but it's very good quality.

All in all, I think this will be a very handy travel tool!

It gives you that DENTIST CLEANING FEEL with our patented Harmonic Resonance technology moving at over 40,000 strokes per minute, making it the "World's Fastest Toothbrush" with each scientifically designed attachement vibrating at a specific frequency for the perfect cleaning every time. It gives you a LONG LASTING CHARGE that allows up to 1-2 weeks of usage with a fully charged brush, giving you the convenient option of leaving the charging base at home when you travel for the weekend, along with a CLEVERLY DESIGNED CHARGING BASE measures 3 inches in diameter with a detachable accessory holder, so it won't take up much needed counter space. We back our quality with our promise which is 100% SATISFACTION, with a 30 day money back guarantee no questions asked, along with 1 full year manufacturer's warranty.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

reviews.text: A system approach to oral hygiene that works for me, and the best oral health care product of its kind available. PERIOD!
